productDisplayName: Fila Men's Breath White Red Shoe
description: This pair of cool white and red sneakers from the Breath range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style while running. The runner friendly design gives superior performance. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and tees for a cool casual look.Upper White mesh upper that give superior breathability White synthetic leather panels and bands on the upper act as a design element and also provide more stability and an ergonomic Fit White lace-ups ensure a snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue give greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Multi-directional pattern on the outsole provides greater grip The impact guidance system provides greater stability while running Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
